original_statement: "I'm backing Croatia to finish first based on their recent World Cup success under Luka Modric."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group L group winner
statement_context: Excerpt from RotoWire bracket breakdown article published on 2026-06-02. Author Adam Zdroik making explicit group-winner prediction.
resolution_criteria: Croatia finishes first in Group L in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-27.
source_text_snippet: I'm backing Croatia to finish first based on their recent World Cup success under Luka Modric.
